story.core_message_de: Zusammenführung — Persona-Graph und Take-home für SICK.
story.core_message_en: Recap of a disruption and audit day in food production + take-home for SICK.

splat_world.prompt_en: Abstract dark space, floating persona constellation nodes, QR panel at eye level, subtle industrial accent lights, minimal stars, cinematic
splat_world.negative_prompt: kitchen, office, filling line clutter, daylight window
splat_world.camera_notes: qr_panel anchor floating at comfortable reading distance

image_prompts.prop_notes: QR code 3D prop; persona node constellation with production/sensor motif

lines.text: Du hast Thomas Berger fünf Minuten lang erlebt.
echeon, CHECKION, AUDION — ein Stör- und Audit-Tag aus seiner Perspektive.
Scanne den Code — dein Report für SICK AG wartet.
